title: opuntia galapageia subsp. profusa
intro: Opuntia galapageia subsp. profusa is a subspecies of the prickly pear cactus native to the Galapagos Islands. It is characterized by its flat, round pads covered in sharp spines and vibrant yellow flowers. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are used to treat various health conditions. The pads and flowers can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting digestive health.
